content.cn_text: 你将听到一名叫 Laura 的商科学生和她的导师讨论一项研究。
content.en_text: You will hear a business student called Laura talking to her tutor about some research

content.cn_text: 她计划研究员工缺勤问题。
content.en_text: she is planning to do on employee absence.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第21至第24题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 21 to 24.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第21至第24题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 21 to 24.

content.cn_text: Tutor：你好 Laura，请坐。我知道你打算研究员工缺勤问题，
content.en_text: Tutor: Hello Laura, have a seat. So I understand you're planning to investigate absence from work

content.cn_text: 作为你的研究项目。 Laura：是的。我打算以一家本地公司为基础，名字叫
content.en_text: for your research project. Laura: That's right. I'm going to base it on a local company called

content.cn_text: Tutor：你选择 Burdock 有什么特别原因吗？
content.en_text: Burdock Engineering. Burdock Engineering。 Tutor: Is there any particular reason why you've chosen Burdock?

content.cn_text: Laura：我原本想问另一家公司，FG Engineering，因为我在那里做过实习，
content.en_text: Laura: Well, I'd originally thought of asking another company, FG Engineering, because I did my placement

content.cn_text: 也认识那里的员工，但 CEO 不太感兴趣。不过她认识 Burdock 的总经理，
content.en_text: there and I knew the staff there, but the CEO wasn't very keen. But she knows the managing director

content.cn_text: 她和他说了之后，他就联系了我。
content.en_text: at Burdock and she spoke to him and then he got in touch with me.

content.cn_text: 显然，缺勤在那里是个大问题，所以他很有兴趣让人调查。
content.en_text: Apparently absence is a major problem there so he's quite interested in having it investigated.

content.cn_text: 所以我的中心主题是缺勤，但我在考虑重点研究长期缺勤。
content.en_text: So my central theme is absence but I'm thinking of concentrating on long term absence.

content.cn_text: 我觉得这样可能能给公司更有帮助的反馈。 Tutor：如果我是你，我不会那么具体。我会研究
content.en_text: I thought that might allow me to give more helpful feedback to the company. Tutor: If I were you I wouldn't be that specific. I'd look at

content.cn_text: 缺勤整体。你可能会得到更有意思的结果。 Laura：哦，好的。
content.en_text: absence as a whole. You might get more interesting results. Laura: Oh okay.

content.cn_text: Tutor：那你主要预期会发现什么？缺勤率随时间上升吗？ Laura：不完全是。一开始我想知道员工是否
content.en_text: Tutor: So what's the main thing you expect to find? Rises in absence rates over time? Laura: Not really. Initially I wondered if workers

content.cn_text: 经常没有真正理由就请假，但我觉得这很难确定。
content.en_text: often take time off without real justification but I think that'll be hard to determine.

content.cn_text: 所以我觉得我可能会发现，这和员工所做的工作类型有关。
content.en_text: So well I think I may find that it's something to do with what sort of job the employee is

content.cn_text: Tutor：好的，那你想过怎么获取信息了吗？
content.en_text: doing. Tutor: Okay, now have you thought how you'll get your information?

content.cn_text: Laura：首先我需要查看公司记录。 Tutor：是的，你显然需要整体缺勤数据，不过他们不太可能
content.en_text: Laura: Well first of all I need access to the company records. Tutor: Yes, obviously you'll need overall absence figures though it's unlikely

content.cn_text: 让你获得个别员工的数据，而且你可能也无法接触个人
content.en_text: they'll let you have them for individual workers and you probably won't have access to personal

content.cn_text: 信息，比如他们的出生日期，但你应该可以使用匿名细节，比如
content.en_text: information like when they were born, but you should be able to use anonymous details like the type

content.cn_text: 他们的工作类型，或者他们在公司工作了多久。 Laura：好的。
content.en_text: of work they do or how long they've been with the company. Laura: Okay.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讨论之前，你有一些时间浏览第25至第30题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the discussion you have some time to look at questions 25 to 30.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第25至第30题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 25 to 30.

content.cn_text: Tutor：那我们再多想想你的问卷。 Laura：我知道它不应该太长，否则人们会
content.en_text: Tutor: So let's think a bit more about your questionnaire. Laura: I know that it shouldn't be too long or people get

content.cn_text: 觉得无聊。 Tutor：是的，但如果太短，你又得不到足够信息。关键是要把握平衡。
content.en_text: bored. Tutor: No, but if it's too short you don't get enough information. The trick is to get the balance

content.cn_text: Laura：我觉得问题也应该是封闭式问题。我的意思是让人们从列表中选择答案。
content.en_text: right. Laura: I think the questions should be closed questions too. I mean where people choose an answer

content.cn_text: Tutor：但那样你会错过获得意外信息的机会，所以我会加入一两个
content.en_text: from a list. Tutor: But then you miss the chance of getting unexpected information so I'd include one or

content.cn_text: 开放式问题。 Laura：好的，而且我不会询问姓名或地址之类的信息。
content.en_text: two open-ended questions too. Laura: Okay, and I won't ask for names or addresses or anything.

content.cn_text: Tutor：对，它需要匿名。而且在你起草完之后，需要把它给至少一个人
content.en_text: Tutor: No, it needs to be anonymous and after you've drafted it you need to give it to at least one

content.cn_text: 检查是否有问题，所以你需要为这件事以及任何
content.en_text: person to check there aren't any problems so you need to leave enough time for that and any

content.cn_text: 必要修改留出足够时间。
content.en_text: revisions necessary.

content.cn_text: Laura：那我随问卷一起寄出的附信呢？
content.en_text: Laura: What about the covering letter that I'll send out with the questionnaire?

content.cn_text: 我需要介绍自己，并解释问卷的目的，但我还应该包括什么？
content.en_text: I'll need to introduce myself and explain what the questionnaire is for but what else should I

content.cn_text: Tutor：我会向人们保证，这项调查不会被用来个人评估他们。
content.en_text: include? Tutor: I'd reassure people that the survey isn't going to be used to assess them personally

content.cn_text: 否则他们可能选择不参加。 Laura：是的，我会说明清楚。
content.en_text: otherwise they might choose not to take part. Laura: Yes I'll make that clear.

content.cn_text: 那他们填写的时候呢？他们可以使用工作时间吗？ Tutor：这其实取决于他们的经理，但你应该说明
content.en_text: And what about when they do it? Will they be allowed to use work time? Tutor: That's really up to their manager but you should say

content.cn_text: 大概需要多长时间。 Laura：好的。
content.en_text: roughly how much time it'll take. Laura: Okay.

content.cn_text: Tutor：现在你需要制定一个带日期的计划表，比如你什么时候发出
content.en_text: Tutor: So now you need to produce a schedule with dates. For example when you'll send out the

content.cn_text: 问卷。 Laura：好的。一旦我能和经理确定那个日期，我就能确定收回已完成问卷的截止日期。
content.en_text: questionnaire. Laura: Yes okay. Once I can arrange that date with the manager I'll be able to fix the deadline for getting the completed questionnaires back.

content.cn_text: 我想利用中间的时间分析人力资源部门将从他们的
content.en_text: And I want to use the time in between to analyse the figures that HR is going to give me from their

content.cn_text: 数据库给我的数据，不过他们还没说我具体什么时候能拿到。 Tutor：而你必须提交作业
content.en_text: database though they haven't said exactly when I'll get them. Tutor: And you have to submit your assignment

content.cn_text: 在六月底之前。 Laura：其实我必须在2号之前完成，因为之后我安排了
content.en_text: by the end of June. Laura: Actually I have to get it finished by the second because I've arranged a

content.cn_text: 工作实习。 Tutor：好的。Laura: 所以我们的下次见面是从今天起两周后。还可以吗？ Tutor：可以，在此期间我会给你发邮件。
content.en_text: work placement after that. Tutor: Okay. Laura: So our next meeting is two weeks today. Is that still okay? Tutor：Yes and in the meantime I'll send you an email.

content.cn_text: 第三部分到此结束。你现在有30秒时间检查第三部分的答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of part three. You now have 30 seconds to check your answers to part three.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C
groups.title: Questions 21–24

items.title: Laura chose Burdock Engineering for her research because

options.title: A
options.content: she was contacted by the managing director.

options.title: B
options.content: she knew several people who worked there.

options.title: C
options.content: she had already done a work placement there.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第21题问 Laura 为什么选择 Burdock Engineering。原文说 Burdock 的 managing director got in touch with me，所以答案是 A. she was contacted by the managing director。FG Engineering 和 placement 是原本考虑的另一家公司，为干扰。

items.title: What does Laura agree to do regarding the central theme of her research?

options.title: C
options.content: be more specific in her aims

items.analysis: 答案解析：第22题问 Laura 同意对研究中心主题做什么。导师建议不要只看 long term absence，而要看 absence as a whole，即扩大研究范围，所以答案是 B. broaden the focus。

items.title: What does Laura expect to find from her research?

options.title: A
options.content: Absence rates are related to the type of work done.

options.title: B
options.content: A lot of worker absence is actually unnecessary.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第23题问 Laura 预期研究会发现什么。原文说 absence 可能和 what sort of job the employee is doing 有关，所以答案是 A. Absence rates are related to the type of work done。缺勤率上升和无正当理由请假都被否定或认为难判断。

items.title: What employee information does the tutor think Laura will be able to obtain from company records?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第24题问导师认为 Laura 能从公司记录中获得什么员工信息。原文说可用匿名信息，如 type of work 和 how long they've been with the company，属于 employment details，所以答案是 B. details of employment。出生日期和个人缺勤记录都被说成不太可能获得。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Which TWO recommendations does the tutor make about Laura’s questionnaire?
groups.title: Questions 25 and 26

list.title: A
list.content: Leave a space for contact details.

list.title: C
list.content: Provide a mixture of question types.

list.title: D
list.content: Keep the length to a minimum.

list.title: E
list.content: Trial it on someone before finalising it.

items.title: Which TWO recommendations does the tutor make about Laura’s questionnaire?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第25题为多选题，问导师对问卷的建议之一。导师建议既有 closed questions，也有 open-ended questions，即提供不同题型混合，所以答案包含 C. Provide a mixture of question types。

items.title: Which TWO recommendations does the tutor make about Laura’s questionnaire?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第26题为多选题，问导师对问卷的另一项建议。原文说 give it to at least one person to check there aren't any problems，即最终确定前先试给别人检查，所以答案包含 E. Trial it on someone before finalising it。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Which TWO things will Laura explain in her covering letter to participants?
groups.title: Questions 27 and 28

list.title: A
list.content: when the questionnaire should be completed

list.title: B
list.content: the fact that participation in the survey is voluntary

list.title: C
list.content: how long the questionnaire is likely to take

list.title: E
list.content: the benefits of participation in the survey

items.title: Which TWO things will Laura explain in her covering letter to participants?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第27题为多选题，问 Laura 会在附信中解释什么。原文说 explain what the questionnaire is for，即说明调查目的，所以答案包含 D. the purpose of the survey。

items.title: Which TWO things will Laura explain in her covering letter to participants?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第28题为多选题，问 Laura 会在附信中解释的另一件事。导师说应说明 roughly how much time it'll take，所以答案包含 C. how long the questionnaire is likely to take。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Which TWO activities does Laura already have definite dates for?
groups.title: Questions 29 and 30

list.title: D
list.content: the next meeting with her tutor

list.title: E
list.content: analysis of figures from the company’s database

items.title: Which TWO activities does Laura already have definite dates for?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第29题为多选题，问 Laura 已经有确定日期的活动之一。原文说 she has to get the assignment finished by the second，所以 finished assignment 的完成日期已定，答案包含 A. completion of her finished assignment。 答案解析：第30题为多选题，问另一个已有确定日期的活动。原文说 next meeting is two weeks today，并得到确认，所以答案包含 D. the next meeting with her tutor。问卷发放、回收和数据分析时间都还未确定。

items.title: Which TWO activities does Laura already have definite dates for?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第29题为多选题，问 Laura 已经有确定日期的活动之一。原文说 she has to get the assignment finished by the second，所以 finished assignment 的完成日期已定，答案包含 A. completion of her finished assignment。 答案解析：第30题为多选题，问另一个已有确定日期的活动。原文说 next meeting is two weeks today，并得到确认，所以答案包含 D. the next meeting with her tutor。问卷发放、回收和数据分析时间都还未确定。
